title: excel upload to populate and merge in to existing line on board
excerpt: In lieu of a quickbook connection I want to export my actual sales from quickbooks in to excel and then upload all my actuals to populate full column all lines on my monday CRM board however the current import feature wi…

posts.author: ChristineWLF (Christine)
posts.cookedHtml: In lieu of a quickbook connection I want to export my actual sales from quickbooks in to excel and then upload all my actuals to populate full column all lines on my monday CRM board however the current import feature will only add a new line which can’t merge with existing line. Is this feature planned for the future?
